creator: akr@fsij.org
text:
CLOCK_THREAD_CPUTIME_ID is not described in the manual page, clock_gettime(2).

FreeBSD 7.1 Release Notes describes that CLOCK_THREAD_CPUTIME_ID is supported.
http://www.freebsd.org/releases/7.1R/relnotes.html

How-To-Repeat: $ man clock_gettime|grep CLOCK_THREAD_CPUTIME_ID
$
